code:
import io
import string

fn abs_of(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best: Option<Int> = None
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut value = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        value = 0
      end
      value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
      value = 0
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    else
      if in_num
        let v = sign * value
        let a = abs_of(v)
        match best
        when None
          best = Some(v)
          best_abs = a
        when Some(_)
          if a < best_abs
            best = Some(v)
            best_abs = a
          end
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        value = 0
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  match best
  when Some(v)
    print("min_abs=#{v}")
  when None
    print("min_abs=")
  end
end
